name: Braton
description: The Braton's high rate of fire and accuracy make it a favorite among the Tenno.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Braton's high rate of fire and accuracy make it a favorite among the Tenno.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Braton Prime

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Nora’s Choice: Update 30.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Braton Prime Stock having incorrect Ducat value for its rarity. It is now 25 instead of 15.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Specific Weapons (E.g. Any variant of Braton or Viper) not playing their Reload animation during any Jump state (E.g. Double/Bullet Jump, Wall Run/Jump).

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Braton Vandal being sellable for only 1 Credit. We increased the sell price to 7500 Credits so that it matches most other Primary Weapons.
Fixed the icons for the Braton Nocturne Skin and Kintsugi Skin missing its clip in the in-game Market and Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Update 27
patchlogs.changes:
Braton: 1.2->1.3
MK1-Braton: 1.2->1.35
Braton Vandal: 1.2->1.25

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Codex entries for the MK-1 weapons, Braton Vandal and Lato Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Replaced the Braton Prime Blueprint with the Braton Prime Receiver in the Lith K2 Relic due to an unintentional vaulting of the Receiver!

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Arbitration boon selecting the MK1-Braton.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lith T2 Relic having 2 Braton Prime Blueprints as a reward (1 common and 1 uncommon). We replaced the common reward with the Valkyr Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Updated icons for the Lato and Braton Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.2
patchlogs.changes: The Shock-Camo Opticor Skin is available for purchase in your Arsenal and we swear it's not a Braton model!

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crafty guard in the Relays who got ahold of two Bratons instead of one.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Made minor updates to Braton Prime’s sound remaster.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: The Braton Prime, Braton Vandal, Aklato, Lato Prime, and Lato Vandal have all had their firing sounds remastered!

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.changes: Improved volume of the new firing sounds introduced in Update 19.10.0 in different environments for the Braton, Braton MK1, Lato, and Paris.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.11.0+19.11.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Further minor firing sound improvement tweaks to the Braton, Lato and Paris.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Optimized remastered Braton, Lato and Paris firing sounds for lower frame rates.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed numerous Braton variants not having a physical magazine. 
Fixed the MK1-Braton not showing its clip after reload.
Fixed the Braton Prime not dropping its clip when using a skin with a clip.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.changes:
Braton Prime 75 to 35
Braton Vandal 50 to 30

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Braton series damage has been increased in Conclave.
Fixed some audio FX not playing properly for the Braton.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Braton

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.changes:
Mk1-Braton damage has been increased in Conclave.
Braton Prime damage has been decreased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Braton series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue causing MK1-Bratons to appear in player equipment profiles.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where two MK1-Bratons appear in player equipment profiles.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Braton (and MK-1 Variant) has been given the PBR treatment.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.10.0
patchlogs.changes: The Braton Vandal has received additional tweaks to its audio FX when fired.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.2 + 16.9.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated the firing sound on the Braton Vandal shots.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Braton stats fixed in the Conclave Arsenal.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Braton’s stats not reading correctly in the Conclave Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.changes: MK1 Braton’s damage has been decreased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: MK1 Braton damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.1 + False Profits Psa
patchlogs.fixes: Tweaked volume of Braton Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes:
The Braton Vandal is now usable in PvP.
Updated audio FX on the Braton Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.3 + 16.3.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed MK1 Braton not being able to use skins.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the damage of all Braton weapons in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Slightly decreased the damage of the MK1 Braton in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes: Rebalanced the MK1 Paris easier to use with comparable damage to the MK1 Braton.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed missing texture on Braton Vandal

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.changes: Braton damage buff.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.3 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes:
Braton Vandal added for this weekend only
Fixed rifle mods not being compatible with new Braton Vandal.
Removed Open-Beta Weekend "Braton Vandal" from Market.
